detail.description:
The ultimate space-aim challenge has arrived!

Are you ready to conquer the galaxy, one planet at a time? Rocket Hit takes the addictive "hit the target" mechanic to the stars. Your mission is simple but intense: launch your rockets into the rotating planet. Strike the core, avoid your own projectiles, and shatter the world to move to the next galaxy!

CAN YOU BECOME THE ROCKET MASTER?
